subcodes.first_line: O radiant candle, kindled by the burning Fire in the Sinai Tree! The temples of being are compounded and fashioned from existing elements [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای شمع روشن از نار موقده در سدره سیناء هیاکل وجود از عناصر موجود مرکب و مرتب
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @fire and light; fire and water, @love as fire
